title: bufonia ephedrina var. minor
intro: Bufonia ephedrina var. minor, also known as Ephedra minor, is a species of shrub in the Ephedraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant contains ephedrine, a naturally occurring alkaloid with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its bronchodilatory and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ephedra minor include improved circulation, reduced fatigue, and enhanced mental clarity, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, or it is combined with other herbs to create medicinal tonics and supplements.
